title: Counter Day
description: Counting the days to the 100 day challenge
body:
🕒 Day Counter Mod
Keep track of your survival days – simple, clean, and essential.

This mod is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by displaying a day counter on the top-left corner of the screen. It provides a clear and simple way to monitor your progress, whether you're doing a long-term survival challenge or just curious how many days have passed.

📦 Features:


📅 Displays the current in-game day on your HUD.

♾️ Supports unlimited day tracking – perfect for 100 Days challenges and beyond.

🎨 Fully customizable: change position, color, and scale through config.

🧭 Works in single-player and multiplayer worlds.

🆕 Updated for Minecraft 1.21.1.

🔧 New in v2.0:

1. ✅ Full compatibility with Minecraft 1.21.1. 
1. 🛠 Internal improvements for smoother performance.
1. 📁 Minor cleanup and file structure optimization.


🔧 New in v3.0.0
- ✅ Added options to change text position.
- ✅ Added options to change text size.
- ✅ Added options to change text color.
- ✅ Simple in-game settings menu included.


⚠️ Changes are not previewed live – you’ll need to save and return to see updates.

🛠 No external libraries or plugins required – the mod stays fully standalone.
